title: Epigram 1. - To Stella.
content:
FROM THE GREEK OF PLATO.

    Thou wert the morning star among the living,
    Ere thy fair light had fled; -
    Now, having died, thou art as Hesperus, giving
    New splendour to the dead.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Percy Bysshe Shelley delivers a powerful performance in "Epigram 1. - To Stella."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
